title: My ML model called the BTC drop. Closed at 5,193 points profit.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Hey guys,

Finally. A proper win to talk about.

The short from 26 Mar closed on 29 Mar at 5,193 points of profit. Shorted at 71,219 and closed at 66,026. Chart is attached so you can see the full trade.

I am not going to lie, after the last few trades this one felt really good. We had a few trades which were not aligning with our expectations and there were moments where I genuinely questioned everything. But I kept posting, kept following the system and this is what came out the other side.

This is exactly why you do not abandon a backtested system after a few bad trades. Losses are part of the process. If you bail every time it gets uncomfortable you will never be around for the wins.

Honestly sitting watching price drop 5,000 points in your direction after everything we have been through recently felt like a breath of fresh air. I am not going to pretend otherwise.



Now the model has given the next signal and it is another short.

* **Pair :** BTC/USD
* **Direction :** SHORT / SELL 
* **Entry :** 31 Mar 2026 at open price UTC 
* **Exit :** 03 Apr 2026 at close price UTC 
* **SL/TP :** None, directional call only 



Same as always. I am following it without question. The model has earned a little trust back after today and I am not about to start second guessing it now.

Let's keep this going.

One last thing. I have been building this model quietly for a while now and also I am posting the trades of my model publicly. And if I count the trades, the result is profitable. So if anyone is genuinely interested in acquiring this model or just wants to know more about how it works, feel free to text me. No pressure at all, just open to the right conversation.

https://preview.redd.it/k1wy32a4idsg1.png?width=967&format=png&auto=webp&s=ef444fb9a5c075acae7232205ceaf24622feb3ca

comments.author: Paul_Kuhn
comments.body: Thanks for your work and that you allow us to participate.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Absolutely...........

Also if anyone you know is interested in acquiring such models please let him see my model.

comments.author: BackTesting-Queen
comments.body: Congrats on your win! Sticking to a backtested system even during rough patches is indeed the key to long-term success. It's great to see your discipline and trust in your model paying off. Keep up the good work!

comments.author: Graphiccatchicago
comments.body: I’m interested in the model and testing it. Dm me!!
